name: Linear Light
description: Lightweight Linear integration — @mention triggers task sessions with status management and notifications

mentionTrigger.description: Text that triggers the agent in comments (default: auto-detect from OAuth app)

autoInProgress.description: Automatically set issue to In Progress when agent starts working

agentIdentity.description: Custom system identity instruction injected into agent prompts. Default: 'You are OpenClaw, a Linear workflow assistant. Do not respond using a personal assistant identity (e.g. Linus). Available tools: linear_update_status (change status), linear_get_issue (view details), linear_search_issues (search). Important: Do not modify issue status (especially do not mark Done) unless explicitly requested by the user.'

initialResponseTemplate.description: Template for initial activity response. Supports {identifier} and {title} placeholders.

linearClientId.description: Linear OAuth client ID (required for token refresh)

linearClientSecret.description: Linear OAuth client secret (required for token refresh)
